title: Lesson 234: 安和, 案内, 以下...

items.gloss: guidance; leading (the way); showing around; information; notice; notification; announcement (of one's arrival); invitation; acquaintance; knowledge
not exceeding; and downward; ... and below; below (e.g. standard); under (e.g. a level); the below-mentioned; the following; the rest
to live; to exist; to make a living; to subsist; to be in effect; to be in use; to function; to come to life; to be enlivened; to be safe (in baseball, go, etc.)
